entity.label: Mishal
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A city of the tribe of Asher (Josh. 21:30; 1 Chr. 6:74). It is probably the modern Misalli, on the shore near Carmel.

nodes.label: Mishal
nodes.description: A city of the tribe of Asher (Josh. 21:30; 1 Chr. 6:74). It is probably the modern Misalli, on the shore near Carmel.

verses.text: And Alammelech, and Amad, and Misheal; and reacheth to Carmel westward, and to Shihorlibnath;
And out of the tribe of Asher, Mishal with her suburbs, Abdon with her suburbs,
